title: Multi-step workflow — zero-downtime column rename requiring dual-write
migration_snippet:
# Goal: rename orders.total_price to orders.total_amount without downtime
# Current: application reads and writes orders.total_price
# Target: application reads and writes orders.total_amount
expected_feedback: Workflow: column rename requires multi-step plan. (1) ADD COLUMN total_amount with same type, nullable, ALGORITHM=INSTANT. (2) Backfill total_amount = total_price in PK-range batches. (3) Deploy app writing to both columns. (4) Deploy app reading from total_amount. (5) MODIFY total_amount to NOT NULL. (6) Separate release: DROP COLUMN total_price. Each phase has pre-condition, validation, and rollback.
